item1.title: Installation & Construction Service
item1.desc: In-depth survey, precise engineering design, and turnkey installation of solar system meeting international quality standards.

item2.title: O&M Service (Operation & Maintenance)
item2.desc: Routine maintenance, professional performance testing, and rapid troubleshooting help maximize electricity output.

item3.title: Solar Panel Cleaning Service
item3.desc: Cleaning solar panels with modern technology helps completely remove dirt, improving solar radiation absorption performance by 15-20%.

item4.title: SCADA Monitoring & Operation
item4.desc: Integrating modern SCADA monitoring software helps track visual operation indicators in real-time and detect errors automatically.

pricing.title: Quick Pricing
pricing.metaDesc: Solar energy capacity calculator and quick pricing tool from TPC Solar.
pricing.intro: Estimate the required solar energy capacity and find the optimal investment options based on your needs.
pricing.lowConsumptionAlert: Your electricity consumption is still low, installing a solar system is not yet efficient
pricing.lowConsumptionDesc: Your electricity consumption is still low, installing a solar system is not yet efficient.
pricing.lowConsumptionTip: If your monthly electricity bill is 1,500,000 VND or more, investment will bring clear benefits and a faster payback period.
pricing.option1Desc: TPC surveys, advises & installs. Customer pays once and enjoys all benefits.
pricing.option2Desc: TPC installs system for free. Customer gets up to 35% off EVN electricity price.
pricing.option2Price: Electricity sales price from: 1,650 VND / kWh
pricing.option3Desc: TPC installs system. Customer pays fixed monthly rent and uses generated electricity.
pricing.option3Price: Rental fee from: 160,000 VND / 1 kWp / month
